interactions.summary: What does it get from taking Odessa? Once it takes Odessa, control of one third of the world's carbohydrates. If Russia willed it, Africa would starve to death. The Middle East would starve. Why? Because Russia and Ukraine export a lot of grain to these places. These places are not food independent. They rely on fertilizer. They rely on food imports. Okay. And Russia's just using the Black Sea here to export. Exactly...
